title: Shuttle Art Glow in the Dark Paints, 12 Colours with UV Light Acrylic Paint Set, 2-in-1 Glow Paints (2oz/60ml) for Wood, Fabric, Crafts, Canvas, Stones - Halloween & Christmas Decorations Art Supplies
features: 12 VIBRANT COLOURS with UV LIGHT: Shuttle Art Glow in the Dark Acrylic Paints come with 12 vibrant colours in 60ml/2 oz bottles, also includes a mini UV light for quick tests of glow effect and temporary light charging and a user manual, making it perfect for various art and craft projects

ENCHANTING GLOW EFFECT: This glow in the dark acrylic paint features a smooth texture and rich pigments with lightfast properties. It glows brightly in the dark and provides a vivid, luminous effect, adding a captivating touch to every creation

FAST CHARGING EXCELLENT GLOW: This black night paint provides a strong glow after being exposed to light. Use sunlight, lamp light, or the included UV light for charging. The more glow in the dark paint applied, the longer it stays charged, and the more pronounced the glow in the dark, with UV light providing the most intense effect

VERSATILE APPLICATION: The glow in the dark acrylic paint is ideal for using on various surfaces such as rocks, wood, canvas, fabric, pumpkins, and glass. This black night paint is great for artists, beginners, adults, and kids, and is perfect for creative projects during holidays and events like Halloween, Easter, Christmas, and neon parties

SERVICE GUARANTEE: Your satisfaction is our top priority, please rest assured to purchase our products. If you are not satisfied with our products or have any questions, please feel free to contact us at any time
description: Product Description Previous page Next page 1 ART SUPPLIES 2 PENCILS 3 PAINT 4 MARKERS 5 PENS 2oz BOTTLE SET ARTIST PAINT 2oz Bottles for Daily Use The right amount for all kinds of creations, enough to go around and not to waste! Labled for Color Recognition For quick selection, the name of each color is labeled on the bottle and cap. MULTI-PURPOSE PAINT Ideal for Craft Painting Suitable for most surfaces like rocks, fabric, walls, canvas, leather, ceramic, wood, clay, crafts and more. Vibrant Colors Bright shades of glow-in-the-dark paint that ignite the imagination and inspire limitless creativity in every project.
